title: Dermicus - Telemedicine Platform for Dermatology
problem: Dermatology wait times are long. GPs struggle to differentiate skin conditions and referrals to specialists take weeks.
solution: Telemedicine platform enabling GPs to send images and case data to dermatologists for remote consultation. Streamlines referrals and speeds up diagnosis.
technology: Image capture, secure messaging, consultation workflow
traction_signals: Used by Swedish primary care centers
regulatory_notes: Healthcare data security, medical consultation platform.
varden_fit: Moderate-High — telemedicine for specialists aligns with Varden's marketplace model. Could integrate specialist consults into platform.
notes: Specialist telemedicine platform. Example of vertical-specific solution.
